title: dolichos glabratus
intro: Dolichos glabratus, also known as Indian hyacinth or Indian laburnum, is a perennial climber belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae). It is native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antibacterial activities. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin disorders, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and enhancing immune function. Dolichos glabratus can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or decoction, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
